data.title: KingBank Computer Desktop Memory Ram DDR5 16GB(2x8GB) 6000MT/s CL36 1.35V Overclocking XMP 3.0 & AMD Expo with Heatsink for PC Gaming/Office/PS,Silver at Amazon.com
data.description:
RAM Memory Technology : DDR5

Memory Speed : 6000 MT/s

Compatible Devices : Desktop

Additional Features : Auto-Overclocking, game memory

Voltage : 1.35 Volts

Column Address Strobe Latency : 36 Picowatts

Form Factor : DIMM

Data Transfer Rate : 6000 MHz

Number of Pins : 288

Brand : KingBank

Model Name : KJXS

Manufacturer : Shenzhen KingBank Technology Co.,LTD.

Warranty Description : lifetime

ASIN : B0GF7QL37W

About this item

  • 【XMP 3.0/EXPO】:Cross-platform compatibility, stable base frequency, overclocking to 6000MHz requires slots 2-4 (limited to overclocking motherboards).
  • 【Top chip】: Adopts high-quality chip, which has been strictly screened and tested to ensure excellent performance and stable output.
  • 【Efficient heat dissipation】: Equipped with 2mm thick alloy radiator, excellent thermal conductivity design, improves heat dissipation efficiency, and helps performance.
  • 【Boosted Performance】: Experience a significant increase in bandwidth and enjoy improved overall performance. Whether you're engaging in intense game competitions or working on graphic design projects, this memory provides high efficiency.
  • Please update the BIOS to the latest version to ensure smooth operation of the device. At the same time, we provide a full range of customer services and quality control to ensure the performance and quality of the product.
